a:["$","div",null,{"id":"cookie-consent","className":"fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#2c2c2c] text-white p-4 z-50 shadow-lg transform translate-y-full transition-transform duration-300","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-white/80","children":["We use cookies to enhance your experience. b:["$","$L2",null,{"id":"cookie-consent-script","strategy":"lazyOnload","children":"\n            (function() {\n              const consent = localStorage.getItem('cookie-consent');\n              const banner = document.getElementById('cookie-consent');\n              \n              if (!consent) {\n                setTimeout(() => {\n                  banner.classList.remove('translate-y-full');\n                }, 1000);\n              }\n              \n              document.getElementById('cookie-accept').addEventListener('click', function() {\n                localStorage.setItem('cookie-consent', 'accepted');\n                banner.classList.add('translate-y-full');\n              });\n              \n              document.getElementById('cookie-decline').addEventListener('click', function() {\n                localStorage.setItem('cookie-consent', 'declined');\n                banner.classList.add('translate-y-full');\n              });\n            })();\n          "}]
